title: Ledger
description: Authoritative, resumable state of every work item. The filesystem checkpoint. Single writer (driver.mjs) folds per-item Workflow results in atomically; agents never write this file directly (they write state/items/<id>/<stage>.json).

cycle.description: Monotonic cycle counter; bumped each scheduling round.

folded.description: Idempotency journal: resultId ('<itemId>#<cycle>') -> ISO timestamp it was folded. Guards against an accidental double-fold double-counting cost + attempts (KI-B4).

attempts.description: Number of fix attempts spent (bounded by config.maxItemRetries).

worktree.description: Path of the git worktree holding this item's changes, if any.

artifacts.description: stage -> path of the artifact the agent wrote (test plan, fix diff summary, gate verdicts, refute report, reaudit summary).

cost.description: model id -> count of routed agent-calls on this item (the faithful 'who did the work' signal; exact token totals live in the per-cycle Workflow run summary).
